title: Coastline: Sunbeam
description: Designed to provide a lightning-fast experience, with all the building tools you'll ever need. Includes Litematica and Axiom.
body:
# **Coastline _Sunbeam_** [ ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/coastline-definitive) [ ](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XgF9kWtx4vHHc97ZJ-4f3KxiPjdav0xz5mKAegNBnS4/edit?usp=sharing) [](https://discord.gg/e5jzkAj9Ms) The ultimate modpack for building, made to work seamlessly on Coastline. Coastline Sunbeam contains everything found in Coastline Definitive, adding powerful building tools to expedite your creativitiy. Experience a fully built-in editor UI and schematic tools, fully integrated with the countless features Coastline Definitive has to offer— planes, ships, knives, and breathtaking landscapes. ## Requirements This modpack is built for version **1.21.1** and runs best on the latest version of **Java**. To run, it needs a launcher like **Curseforge, Modrinth,** or **Prism.** ## FAQs
What's Coastline? Coastline is a modded SMP focused on exploration and building. We're always happy to welcome new players. To get started, join our Discord server, which is linked to this page.
How does this differ from Coastline Definitive? Coastline Sunbeam offers two main new tools for builders: Axiom and Litematica. Nothing is removed.
### Check out our other versions: ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Edition-Coastline_Definitive-033ad3?style=plastic&labelColor=%23e7e7e7&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fproject%2FzJtJ87Ke) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Edition-Coastline_Ace-AC1E23?style=plastic&labelColor=%23e7e7e7) > **Note:** All resources and third-party material belong to their respective owners.
